title: Astro's Clientside Pack (Lite)
description: SMP pack for a smoother experience
body:
Lite version note

Many mods from the full ACP modpack were updating slower than the recent release schedule of the base game. As a result, I broke off the full ACP modpack into a lighter version that will hopefully be easier to keep up-to-date with the base game.

About

Simple Fabric modpack. No core gameplay is altered.
This is a fully client-side pack that solely improves the user experience of Minecraft Java Edition and adds quality-of-life features.

Features

🌟 Improves game performance significantly
➰ Fluid animations for many player/entity actions, UI elements, etc.
🏔️ LOD rendering for long render distances
✨ Many aesthetic & QOL improvements
🧭 In-game resource/data pack browser & downloader + OptiFine/shader pack support
🌲 Ambient world & UI sounds

Included resources

Custom instance of Vanilla Tweaks
Fresh Animations resourcepack (credit to FreshLX)
Complementary Reimagined shaderpack

Credits No mods or textures belong to me.
  • VanillaTweaks team (vanillatweaks.net)
  • Complimentary Reimagined shaders by EminGTR (CurseForge)
  • Fresh Animations resource pack by FreshLX (CurseForge)
  • pablotequila (CurseForge)
  • Reijvi (CurseForge)
  • TinyDaggsy (CurseForge)
The original version of the pack (deprecated – no longer maintained) is available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/astros-clientside-pack).
